{{CargoRelic
|name=Ancient Snail Fossil
|class_id=20084
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Tens of millions of years ago, snails were not the mollusks they are today but vertebrates with a skeleton. This weathered ancient fossil is the best evidence of this theory!
|fame=12
|art=18
|fth=15
|civ=30
|tech=15
|ss1=Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +2%<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +4<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +4%<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +8<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +6%<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +12<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +6%<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +12<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Quarry produces Ancient Fossil by +6%<br>Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail DEF +12<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
